Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants 20 thought-provoking, open-ended questions about the described complex multinational supply chain process for smartphones. The user wants only a list of questions, not any SQL queries or answers. The user is not requesting disallowed content. Theres no policy violation. So we can comply.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to generate 20 questions that are open-ended, thought-provoking, focusing on insights, potential issues, strategies for improvement, and implications of decisions. Should not be yes/no, should encourage deeper analysis. Should be varied across supply chain stages: RD, procurement, supplier management, logistics, inventory, demand planning, risk management, sustainability, compliance, technology, etc.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The user wants just the list of questions, numbered perhaps. Thus we comply.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Make sure to be thorough. Possibly group by theme: design, procurement, manufacturing, logistics, distribution, risk, sustainability, technology, regulatory, after-sales.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Potential questions: How can RD better incorporate supplier capabilities early? How can lead time variability be mitigated? What strategies can reduce carbon footprint? How to manage currency risk? How to ensure quality across suppliers? How to coordinate multi-modal transport? What are trade-offs between JIT vs aggregated shipments? How to handle product recall efficiently? How to leverage data analytics? How to manage supplier concentration risk? How to incorporate sustainability? How to balance cost vs compliance? How to improve demand forecasting? How to manage regulatory differences? How to ensure labor standards? How to handle logistics disruptions? How to design packaging for sustainability? How to integrate after-sales support into supply chain planning? How to improve resilience? How to manage inventory at regional DCs? How to handle customs complexity? How to use AI for predictive maintenance? How to involve suppliers in continuous improvement? How to ensure data security across digital systems? How to support emerging markets?

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need exactly 20 questions. Lets count.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure each is open-ended, not yes/no.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now produce final answer with just list of 20 questions.
